convergenceMethod: three-grid nonlinear least-squares fit Cd(h)=Cd0+C*h^p over p in [0.05,8], with 1.25 fine-grid GCI safety factor
limiterMode: cell-local common scale on complete symmetric TRT increment
scientificVerdict: At least one predeclared source-aware stability, force-budget, limiter-intervention, or grid-convergence gate failed. Keep the limiter out of coupled bird replay and use the archived resolution trend to isolate the remaining defect.
